home.meta_title: Porto dos Ribeiros — Brazilian food in Porto, since 2023
home.meta_description: Brazilian cooking on Rua da Constituição, in Cedofeita, since 2023. Stroganoff, jardineira, picanha — made slowly, every day.

hero.headline: Brazilian cooking, with saudade of home
hero.body: Stroganoff, jardineira, picanha. Brazilian dishes made on the counter and on the stove — no rush, no afternoon close. Cedofeita is our neighbourhood.
hero.image_alt: Brazilian picanha at Porto dos Ribeiros

hours.title: No pause between lunch and dinner
hours.footnote: Hours to confirm with the restaurant.

menu_preview.title: Dishes that return every day
menu_preview.intro: Brazilian home cooking — not a botequim, not fine dining. Food made the way it's made at home, with time and care, every day of the year.
menu_preview.more_note: And more — empadas, brigadeiros, picanha — always on the counter.
menu_preview.price_note: Prices to confirm with the restaurant.

strogonoff.label: Creamy dish
strogonoff.name: Beef stroganoff
strogonoff.story: Creamy, with white rice and crispy potato sticks. A family recipe, made on the counter to serve hot all day.

jardineira.label: Slow stew
jardineira.name: Jardineira
jardineira.story: Beef and vegetable stew, slow-cooked. Comes off the counter daily — when it's gone, it's gone.

coxinha.label: Boteco classic
coxinha.name: Chicken coxinha
coxinha.story: Thin dough, creamy filling. Hand-formed in the morning, fried throughout the day.

reviews.title: What people say on Google
reviews.feature_quote: From the very first visit, this Brazilian restaurant completely stole our hearts. It's not just a place to eat — it feels like family.
reviews.disclaimer: Review pulled from the public Google profile.
reviews.see_more_aria: See more reviews on the Google profile
reviews.stamp_text: On Rua da Constituição, with saudade of Brazil.

visit.title: In the heart of Cedofeita
visit.body_1: Porto dos Ribeiros sits on a quiet corner of Rua da Constituição, a few minutes' walk from Carolina Michaëlis station. Cedofeita is our neighbourhood — authentic, no tourist traps, full of neighbours.
visit.body_2: No reservations needed. Walk in, sit down, order breakfast or lunch — anything at any time of day. For home delivery, call or send a WhatsApp message.
visit.transit: 5 min walk from Carolina Michaëlis station (Line E)
